title: A Bit of Better Bottling (Faithful 32x)
description: Animates and tweaks bottled stuff! An addon for Faithful 32x.
body:
A small addon for [**Faithful 32x**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) that changes potion and liquid-related textures:

- Tweaks the basic potion shading to be a bit simpler, and adds a 1-pixel gap around the edge of the bottle
- Changes the texture for dragon's breath and honey bottles
- Changes coloration of the water bottle and all water buckets to be lighter
- Adds unique animations for thick, mundane, and awkward potions
- Adds animations for long-lasting and powerful variants of potions

**Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**
